evals.name: sales-dashboard-basic
evals.prompt: 帮我创建一个销售数据看板，展示各区域的销售额和同比增长
evals.expected_output: React dashboard with KPI cards showing total sales, bar chart comparing regional sales, and line chart showing YoY growth trend

assertions.description: Should include bar chart for regional comparison
Should include KPI cards for total sales
Should have region dimension
Must create main App.tsx entry component
Should have mock data file

evals.name: marketing-funnel
evals.prompt: 做一个营销漏斗分析，展示从曝光到转化的各阶段数据
evals.expected_output: Dashboard with funnel chart showing conversion stages, KPI cards for conversion rates

assertions.description: Should include funnel chart
Should mention conversion metrics
Should have stage dimension
Must create main App.tsx entry component

evals.name: product-retention-trend
evals.prompt: 展示产品用户留存率的月度趋势
evals.expected_output: Line chart or area chart showing retention rate over time with proper date axis

assertions.description: Should include line chart for trend
Should have retention metric
Should have time dimension
Must create main App.tsx entry component
Should generate LineChart component for trend

evals.name: finance-composition
evals.prompt: 可视化公司各部门预算占比
evals.expected_output: Pie or donut chart showing budget allocation by department

assertions.description: Should include pie chart for composition
Should have department dimension
Should have budget metric
Must create main App.tsx entry component

evals.name: vague-request
evals.expected_output: Should trigger Socratic dialogue to gather requirements, asking about business domain, metrics, dimensions

assertions.description: Should ask clarifying questions
Should attempt to identify business domain
